_comment: Live config lives at $CLAUDE_PA_HOME/config.json (default: ~/.local/share/claude-pa/config.json), NOT here. This file is shipped with the plugin as a template — copy + edit, or run /claude-pa:setup-ha to have an agent fill it in for you.

signal_bulb._comment: Continuous visual status channel. Fires in PARALLEL with audio dispatches. Requires an RGB-capable light entity.

wake._comment: Tier 7. Defaults OFF. Flashes the bedroom light to wake the user. Only fires within night_hours unless --force is passed.

spouse_call._comment: Tier 8. Defaults OFF. Calls the user's spouse via Twilio to passive-aggressively complain. Planned feature — stub only. Requires TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN.

usage_monitor._comment: Polls Claude Code session JSONL and fires usage:* dispatches on threshold crossings. Run via a Stop hook (see commands/setup-usage-monitor.md). session_token_budget defines what 100% means for one session.
